Store

Take a piece of it home — stickers, merch, and prints of both my paintings and my photography.

Stickers

Vinyl sticker packs pulled from the art and photo series — small, weatherproof, easy to throw on a laptop or bottle.

A bit about me.

I'm Raghad, some call me riri. I was born an artist, and I've been one ever since. I'm from Jeddah, Saudi Arabia, and I live in Hawaiʻi. I have love for both the desert and the ocean. I spent half a decade in the Pacific Ocean, and Asian culture became a part of my journey.

Self-taughtCoffee addict

4.1% of the world, so far.

Let's connect.
